text.title: event-sourcing-implementation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the event-sourcing-implementation methodology end-to-end.

step.name: author-schema
step.action: Write events + snapshots tables with UNIQUE and append-only grants.

step.name: wire-event-bus
step.action: On successful append, dispatch events to subscribed projection handlers.
step.decision-gate: Projection handlers retry via DLQ; never block append.

step.name: add-snapshots
step.action: When replay length > 50, snapshot after replay; load snapshot first next time.

step.name: write-replay-determinism-test
step.action: Integration test that re-replays a stream twice and asserts identical state.
